personality_one_liner: A sleek, highly readable, premium dark-mode chat interface that feels effortlessly native and intentionally restrained.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for chat bubbles. Tight padding inside composer. Obvious hit slops for actions.

do's: Apply heavy dark glass effect to the top header and bottom composer container so scrolling messages blur smoothly beneath them.
Ensure a tinted underlying base (≥75% opacity) to maintain high contrast for composer inputs.
dont's: Do not blur individual chat bubbles.
Do not use glass inside the drawer.

screens.name: Chat
screens.purpose: The main conversational interface for AI interaction.

states.loading: Centered soft pulsing AI orb logo.
states.empty: Subtle dark tech texture background with a centered greeting 'Halo! Apa yang bisa saya bantu hari ini?' and suggestion chips.
states.error: Small inline error bubble with a 'Coba lagi' (Retry) button.

screens.layout: Root uses a full pure black background. Top header is sticky glass with Hamburger (left) and New Chat (right). Message stream takes full width with 16px padding. User bubbles are right-aligned, surfaceSecondary color, max-width 80%. AI messages are left-aligned, transparent background, with an AI avatar on the left. The composer is pinned to the bottom inside a KeyboardAvoidingView with a glass backdrop, containing an attachment (plus) icon, auto-expanding text input, and a send button.

screens.name: HistoryDrawer
screens.purpose: Slide-in drawer to manage past conversations and view creator info.
screens.layout: Full height drawer sliding from the left. Background is surfaceSecondary. Top has a prominent 'Obrolan Baru' (New Chat) pill button. Below is a ScrollView of past chats (title and date). The bottom safe area houses a static footer reading 'Dibuat oleh cuffli' with a subtle version number.

ai_avatar_orb.alt: Warm glowing geometric cubes abstract logo

dark_tech_texture.alt: Subtle dark minimal tech texture with dots

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the main background is explicitly set to `#000000` as requested by the user ('Warna latar belakang nya itam').
Use Phosphor icons. Make sure the attachment icon inside the composer allows users to select an image from gallery/camera.
For the AI message streaming effect, ensure Reanimated is used for a smooth typewriter effect without layout jumping.
The Drawer must have a persistent footer containing the text 'Dibuat oleh cuffli' as explicitly requested.
Make sure the composer input bar dynamically resizes with multiline text and correctly shifts up with the KeyboardAvoidingView on both iOS and Android.
Implement a 'Copy Message' feature on long-press of any AI message bubble, triggering a haptic 'notificationSuccess'.
Use Indonesian for all system strings (e.g., 'Ketik pesan...', 'Obrolan Baru', 'Coba lagi').
Never use blue, indigo, or purple. Stick strictly to the provided neutral/sage palette.
